name: ride_booking_extraction
description: Extracts structured ride booking / reservation details from a free-form email body. All fields are nullable so the model can return null when a value is not present in the email rather than hallucinating.

name.description: Full name of the customer (first and last). Null if not present.

email_address.description: Customer email address. Lowercased, no surrounding angle brackets or 'mailto:' prefix. Null if not present.

phone_number.description: Customer phone number in E.164 format when possible (e.g. '+14045551234'). If country code is unknown, return digits only. Null if not present.

date_of_birth.description: Customer date of birth in ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD. Null if not present, unparseable, or shown as '#ERROR!'.

occasion.description: The occasion for the ride. Must be EXACTLY one of the allowed values (case-sensitive) or null. Map common synonyms: 'airport pickup/drop' -> 'Airport Transfer', 'bday' -> 'Birthday', 'concert' or 'festival' -> 'Concert/Festival', 'film/tv shoot' or 'crew transport' -> 'Production', 'sporting event/game' -> 'Sports Events', 'sightseeing' -> 'Tour', 'World Cup' or 'FIFA match' -> 'FIFA'. If the email mentions an occasion that does not clearly match any value, use 'Other'. Use null only when no occasion is mentioned at all.

number_of_passengers.description: Total number of passengers as an integer. Null if not specified.

date_of_service.description: Date the ride is scheduled for, in ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD. Null if not present.

pickup_time.description: Pick-up time in 24-hour HH:MM format (e.g. '19:00' for 7:00 PM). Null if not present.

drop_off_time.description: Drop-off / return time in 24-hour HH:MM format. Null if not present.

pickup_address.description: Street address for pick-up (street number + street name only, no apartment, city, state, or zip). Null if not present.

apartment_suite.description: Apartment number, suite, unit, or building name for the pick-up address. Null if not present.

city.description: City of the pick-up address. Null if not present.

state_province.description: State or province of the pick-up address. Use full name (e.g. 'Georgia') when given that way; otherwise preserve the source. Null if not present.

zip_postal_code.description: ZIP or postal code of the pick-up address as a string (preserve leading zeros). Null if not present.

destination_address_or_stops.description: Destination address or any requested intermediate stops. If multiple stops are listed, join them with ' | ' in the order requested. Null if not present.

final_drop_off_address.description: Final drop-off address (typically the return location at the end of the trip; often the same as the pickup address for round trips). Null if not present.

how_did_you_hear_about_us.description: Source / referral channel as written by the customer (e.g. 'Google', 'Worked with prior', 'Instagram'). Null if not present.

promo_or_referral_code.description: Promo code or referral code provided by the customer. Null if not present.

date_of_form_submission.description: Date the form was submitted, in ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD. Null if not present.

time_of_form_submission.description: Time the form was submitted in 24-hour HH:MM:SS format. Include timezone offset suffix when given (e.g. '18:46:51-05:00'). Null if not present.
